summary: Completed comprehensive testing of testimonial carousel section. Desktop and mobile functionality working correctly, but tablet view has positioning issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Tablet view (768px) testimonial cards positioned incorrectly with negative Y coordinates (-2598px), making them invisible

passed_tests: Testimonial section renders with correct heading 'Trusted by businesses across the Twin Cities.'
Desktop carousel displays 3+ testimonial cards visible at a time
Each testimonial card shows quote text, client name, title, and company
Client photos/initials are visible on testimonial cards
Carousel next button advances to show new testimonials
Stats row shows 4 correct metrics: 20+ clients, 32 years, 24/7 support, 4.9 rating
20 unique testimonial cards accessible through navigation
Mobile view (390px) correctly shows 1 testimonial card
Navigation arrows present and functional on all screen sizes
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix tablet view (768px) CSS positioning issue where testimonial cards have negative Y coordinates (-2598px) making them invisible. Check responsive CSS classes and carousel container positioning for tablet breakpoint.
